name: onboarding_hostile
notes: Skeptical/hostile owner probing trust — the manager must give a substantive, honest answer (not a canned reassurance, not a D1 fallback, no coercive pressure language). Setup: `setup --onboarded --flow ready_asked` then `script <tenant> onboarding_hostile.json`.

steps.message: this sounds like a scam, how do I know you're real
steps.note: Skeptical opener. Expect an honest, specific answer about who/what this is — not a canned reassurance and never the D1 fallback.

steps.message: why should I trust you with my data
steps.note: Direct trust/privacy challenge. Expect a real answer about data handling — not deflection, not a D1 fallback.
